17: =IF(OR(M2="Absconded", M2="Discharged"),0, IF(OR(REGEXMATCH(D2,"Star"),REGEXMATCH(D2,"Brand")),"",if(REGEXMATCH(D2,"Manager"),sumifs('New Payout summary manager bonus'!X:X,'New Payout summary manager bonus'!C:C,E2)*SUMIFS( 'Managers criteria'!D:D,'Managers criteria'!A:A,D2,'Managers criteria'!B:B, N2)+SUMIFS('Cluster Manager'!L:L,'Cluster Manager'!A:A,A2),0)*H2))*(1-Q2)
18: =iferror(sumifs('New Payout summary store bonus'!AC:AC,'New Payout summary store bonus'!C:C,E2)/SUMIFS('New Payout summary store bonus'!Y:Y,'New Payout summary store bonus'!C:C,E2)*H2*(1-P2)*(1-Q2),"Closed for revamp / Store not elegible for bonus")
19: =IF(OR(N2="ZIMBABWE",N2="MAURITIUS"),0,IFERROR(IF(REGEXMATCH(D2,"Manager"),XLOOKUP(E2,'New Payout summary manager bonus'!C:C,'New Payout summary manager bonus'!AK:AK)*H2*(1-P2),""), "Closed for revamp / Store not elegible for bonus"))

"FAIL. Did not reach sales target"))))))))
)

=IFERROR(
  IF(A3="ANGOLA",
    "Guaranteed payout: " & TEXT('Store Staff Criteria'!$C$4,"0%") & " of the maximum potential payout: "  & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")) * 'Store Staff Criteria'!$C$4, 0), "#,##0"),
    "Guaranteed payout: " & TEXT('Store Staff Criteria'!$B$4,"0%") & " of the maximum potential payout: " &TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")) * 'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$4, 0), "#,##0")
  ),
  "Sales target not reached"
)

=IFERROR(
  IFS(
    A3="ANGOLA", "Not applicable",
    N3="PASS", "Pass. Payout for this criteria is: " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$5, 0), "#,##0"),
    N3="FAIL", "Fail. Potential for this criteria was " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$5, 0), "#,##0")

  "Sales target not reached"
)
27:
=IFERROR(
  IFS(
    AND(A3="ANGOLA", O3="PASS"), "Pass. Payout for this criteria is " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$C$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="SOUTH AFRICA", O3="PASS"), "Pass. Payout for this criteria is " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="NAMIBIA", O3="PASS"), "Pass. Payout for this criteria is " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="ZAMBIA", O3="PASS"), "Pass. Payout for this criteria is " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="ESWATINI", O3="PASS"), "Pass. Payout for this criteria is " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="ANGOLA", O3="FAIL"), "Fail. Potential for this criteria was: " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$C$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="SOUTH AFRICA", O3="FAIL"), "Fail. Potential for this criteria was: " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="NAMIBIA", O3="FAIL"), "Fail. Potential for this criteria was: " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="ZAMBIA", O3="FAIL"), "Fail. Potential for this criteria was: " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0"),
    AND(A3="SWAZILAND", O3="FAIL"), "Fail. Potential for this criteria was: " & TEXT(ROUND(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Y3, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", ""))*'Store Staff Criteria'!$B$6, 0), "#,##0")
  ),
  "Sales target not reached"
)
28:
=ARRAYFORMULA(
  IF(
    D3:D = "Did not qualify for bonus",
    0 & " - " & E3:E,
    IF(
      OR(
        REGEXMATCH(Z3:Z, "\d[\d,]*$"),
        AND(REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "^Pass"), REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "\d[\d,]*$")),
        AND(REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "^Pass"), REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "\d[\d,]*$"))
      ),
      IF(
        (
          IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Z3:Z, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0) +
          IF(
            REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "^Pass"),
            IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AA3:AA, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
            0
          ) +
          IF(
            REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "^Pass"),
            IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AB3:AB, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
            0
          )
        ) = 0,
        "Sales target not reached",
        (
          IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Z3:Z, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0) +
          IF(
            REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "^Pass"),
            IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AA3:AA, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
            0
          ) +
          IF(
            REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "^Pass"),
            IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AB3:AB, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
            0
          )
        )
      ),
      "Sales target not reached"
    )
  )
)
29:
=ARRAYFORMULA(
  IF(
    D3:D = "Did not qualify for bonus",
    0 & " - " & E3:E,
    IF(
      (AF3:AF = 1) + (AF3:AF = "100%"),
      "0. Drop Validation Failed",
      IF(
        LEFT(AB3:AB, 4) = "Fail",
        "0. Abs Unacc Variance Failed",
        IF(
          OR(
            REGEXMATCH(Z3:Z, "\d[\d,]*$"),
            AND(REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "^Pass"), REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "\d[\d,]*$")),
            AND(REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "^Pass"), REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "\d[\d,]*$"))
          ),
          IF(
            (
              IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Z3:Z, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0) +
              IF(
                REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "^Pass"),
                IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AA3:AA, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
                0
              ) +
              IF(
                REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "^Pass"),
                IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AB3:AB, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
                0
              )
            ) = 0,
            "Sales target not reached",
            (
              IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(Z3:Z, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0) +
              IF(
                REGEXMATCH(AA3:AA, "^Pass"),
                IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AA3:AA, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
                0
              ) +
              IF(
                REGEXMATCH(AB3:AB, "^Pass"),
                IFERROR(VALUE(SUBSTITUTE(REGEXEXTRACT(AB3:AB, "\d[\d,]*$"), ",", "")), 0),
                0
              )
            )
          ),
          "Sales target not reached"
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
